title: phyteuma betonicifolium subsp. betonicifolium
intro: Phyteuma betonicifolium subsp. betonicifolium, also known as Alpine Phyteuma, is a perennial plant species belonging to the bellflower family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phyteuma betonicifolium subsp. betonicifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
